content.query:
/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 2, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_ActualSales
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                     Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 02, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
August 04, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Brand from Part/InvMaster
August 11, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Cost and Supplier
August 11, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added WB, Company O, and Excal from Company L
August 12, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Added Company A
********************************************************************************************************/
--drop view v_ActualSales
CREATE VIEW v_ActualSales AS 
(

SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Edgecraft' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description],
  P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID],
  V.NAME as [Suppler Name],
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt],
  COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
  JOIN ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
  JOIN ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
  JOIN ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
  JOIN ECM.VENDOR V ON P.PREF_VENDOR_ID = V.ID
WHERE COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE >= '2019-01-01'
  AND CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM ECM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Westbend' as Company, 
  CUSTOMER_ID as [Customer ID], 
  C.NAME as [Customer Name], 
  C.USER_3 as [Budget Category], 
  COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Ship Date], 
  CO.ID as [Order ID], 
  CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO],
  P.USER_1 as [Brand],
  P.ID as [Part ID], 
  P.DESCRIPTION as [Part Description],
  P.PREF_VENDOR_ID as [Supplier ID],
  V.NAME as [Suppler Name],
  COL.TOTAL_AMT_SHIPPED as [Sales Amt],
  COL.ORDER_QTY as [Sales Qty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO 
  JOIN WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID 
  JOIN WBM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID 
  JOIN WBM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on P.ID = CPC.ID
  JOIN WBM.VENDOR V ON P.PREF_VENDOR_ID = V.ID
WHERE COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2021-07-01'
  AND CUSTOMER_PO_REF NOT LIKE 'RMA%' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND C.USER_3 <> 'GWT'
AND CO.ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID FROM WBM.RMA where NEW_CUST_ORDER_ID IS NOT NULL)



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCL.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'L'
  AND SB.Brand IN ('Excalibur', 'Yonanas', 'Zeroll')
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company L' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC.Category as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCL.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCL.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomerPlus AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.ArCustomer AC2 on AC.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCL.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCL.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'L'
  AND SB.Brand NOT IN ('Excalibur', 'Yonanas', 'Zeroll')
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND AC.Category <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC.Category <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  CASE WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'CHEF' then 'Chefs Choice'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'EXCL' then 'Excalibur'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'OMEG' then 'Omega'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'VINT' then 'Vinturi'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'WEST' then 'WestBend'
  WHEN IM.ProductClass = 'ZERO' then 'Zeroll'
  ELSE 'Yonanas' END as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [SalesQty],
  CPC.COST as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC on SM.Customer = AC.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode 
  JOIN SCG.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  LEFT JOIN ECM.COST_BY_PART_CONSUMER CPC on IM.StockCode = CPC.ID
WHERE 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND OrderStatus IN ('9') 
  AND IM.ProductClass IN (
    'CHEF', 'EXCL', 'OMEG', 'VINT', 'WEST', 
    'ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP'
  ) 
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0



UNION ALL 



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company G' as Company, 
  AC2.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'GWT' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCG.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCG.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCG.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCG.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCG.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'G'
  AND SB.Brand NOT IN ('Excalibur', 'Yonanas', 'Zeroll', 'Omega', 'Chefs Choice', 'Vinturi', 'Westbend')
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Consumer' as Division,
  'Company O' as Company, 
  AC2.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  AC2.UserField1 as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCO.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCO.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCO.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCO.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCO.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'O'
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND AC2.UserField1 <> 'INTERCOMPANY' 
  AND AC2.UserField1 <> 'GWT' 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'



UNION ALL



SELECT 
  'Commercial' as Division,
  'Company A' as Company, 
  AC2.Customer as [Customer ID], 
  AC2.Name as [Customer Name], 
  'AFS' as [Budget Category], 
  COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) as [Ship Date], 
  SM.SalesOrder as [Order ID], 
  CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO],
  SB.Brand as [Brand],
  MStockCode as [Part ID], 
  IM.Description as [Part Description],
  IM.Supplier as [Supplier ID],
  SU.SupplierName as [Supplier Name],
  MPrice * MOrderQty as [Sales Amt],
  MOrderQty as [Sales Qty],
  LabourCost + MaterialCost + FixOverhead + VariableOverhead as [Cost per Unit]
FROM 
  SCA.SorMaster SM 
  JOIN SCA.SorDetail SD ON SM.SalesOrder = SD.SalesOrder 
  JOIN SCA.ArCustomer AC2 on SM.Customer = AC2.Customer 
  JOIN SCA.InvMaster IM on SD.MStockCode = IM.StockCode
  JOIN SCA.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
  JOIN SCA.Syspro_Brands SB on IM.ProductClass = SB.ProductClass
WHERE 
  SB.Company = 'A'
  AND COALESCE(MLineShipDate, ReqShipDate) >= '2019-01-01'
  AND MPrice * MOrderQty > 0 
  AND OrderStatus = '9'
)
